name: OMNIQ Corp.
summary: OMNIQ Corp. is a provider of computerized and machine-vision image-processing solutions using patented AI technology for data collection, real-time surveillance, and monitoring. The company serves supply chain management, homeland security, public safety, traffic and parking management, and access control markets. Products include barcode labels, RFID tags, printing solutions, credit card terminals, automatic kiosks, point-of-care units, mobile and wireless equipment, and configurable software. Customers include government agencies and Fortune 500 companies across more than 40 countries, with annual revenues exceeding $80 million.

products.name: Barcode Labels, Tags, and Ribbons
products.description: Established distribution of barcode labels, tags, ribbons for data collection applications.

products.name: RFID Labels and Tags
products.description: RFID-based labels and tags for tracking and identification purposes.

products.name: Printing Solutions
products.description: Printing equipment with full staging and kitting services.

products.name: Automatic Kiosks
products.description: Automatic kiosk units deployed across various customer environments.

products.name: Point-of-Care Units
products.description: Point-of-care hardware units for healthcare and related applications.

products.name: Credit Card Terminals
products.description: Credit card terminal solutions provided to customers.

products.name: Mobile and Wireless Equipment
products.description: Best-in-class mobile computing and wireless data-collection devices.

products.name: Order Entry Software
products.description: Increases productivity for remote field workers requiring real-time data access.

products.name: AI-Based Vision Solutions
products.description: Patented AI and machine-learning algorithms for homeland security and automated parking solutions.

products.name: Configurable Packaged Software
products.description: Comprehensive packaged and configurable software solutions for supply chain and safe city markets.
